summary: Frontend-only testing for 4 UI changes: WhatsApp Bot adaptive height, Leads page labels/buttons/spacer, Loyalty page metrics-only, and BulkPage removal. All 10 test cases PASSED.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 UI changes have been verified: 1) WhatsApp Bot chat window has adaptive height calc(100vh - 140px), 2) Leads page has CANAL and AGENTES labels above dropdowns with 80px spacer, 3) Upload/Download buttons moved to Leads page next to Nuevo Lead, 4) Loyalty page shows only metrics without buttons/tabs, 5) Carga/Descarga removed from sidebar, 6) /bulk route redirects to home

test_results.test_1_sidebar_no_bulk: PASS - 'Carga / Descarga' NOT in sidebar. Nav items: Dashboard, WhatsApp Bot, Leads, Asesores, Campañas, QR y Canales, Juegos, Fidelización, Configuración, Productos y Bots
test_results.test_2_leads_upload_download_buttons: PASS - Upload button 'Cargar Archivo' and Download button 'Descargar Excel' found next to 'Nuevo Lead'
test_results.test_3_leads_canal_agentes_labels: PASS - 'Canal' label above source filter and 'Agentes' label above advisor filter found
test_results.test_4_leads_80px_spacer: PASS - 80px spacer div found between search area and kanban board
test_results.test_5_loyalty_metrics_only: PASS - Metrics dashboard found with summary cards, Revenue por Producto chart, Retención de Clientes pie chart, Tasa de Recompra bars, Top Compradores table. No forbidden buttons/tabs found
test_results.test_6_chat_adaptive_height: PASS - Chat grid has adaptive height: calc(-140px + 100vh)
test_results.test_7_download_excel_works: PASS - Download initiated successfully, file: fakulti_reporte_all_20260325.xlsx
